holdings.infoBox: VSLU is an equity ETF with a total of 459 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 10.59%, Apple at 9.69%, Alphabet at 7.59%, Microsoft at 6.52%, and Meta Platforms at 3.96%.

overview.description: The Applied Finance Valuation Large Cap ETF (VSLU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund the selects at least 200 US large-cap stocks based on a proprietary valuation driven investment process. VSLU was launched on Apr 29, 2021 and is issued by Applied Finance.
